messages.content:
React Interview
  fix: #jent-15400, 15401
  Fixed broken link on candidate profile page
  Updated interview timer logic

Integration
  Tested webhook integration with third party service
  Fixed authentication issue with external API

Candidate Recommendation
  update: improved matching algorithm accuracy
  fix: wrong candidate showing in recommendations

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)

Key Updates

    React Interview
        - fix: #jent-15400, 15401
        - Fixed broken link on candidate profile page
        - Updated interview timer logic

    Integration
        - Tested webhook integration with third party service
        - Fixed authentication issue with external API

    Candidate Recommendation
        - update: improved matching algorithm accuracy
        - fix: wrong candidate showing in recommendations

Key Achievements
    - Improved React Interview functionality with fixes and updates
    - Successfully integrated with third party service through webhooks
    - Enhanced Candidate Recommendation accuracy

Challenges Encountered
    - None

Team Challenges
    - None

Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
    - None

Interview API - finally fixed that annoying #jent-15202 bug where interviews would sometimes not get recorded, was a pain to track down but turned out to be a simple fix. also did some enhancements #enh-2345 to improve the overall response time, shaved off around 30ms. still need to work on #jent-15566 but that's a bigger task

Auto Job Apply Script - updated the script to handle new job posting formats #update-123, also fixed a small issue with #bug-1098 where the script would crash if a job posting was missing certain fields. added a new feature #feat-3456 to allow the script to automatically follow up with employers after a certain amount of time

Authentication - had to do some chores #chore-456 to update dependencies and fix some security vulnerabilities, nothing too exciting but necessary. did notice a weird issue with #jent-15000 where auth tokens would sometimes expire too quickly, need to look into that

React Interview - lots of work on this module this week, fixed a bunch of bugs #bug-2342 #bug-2343 #bug-2344, also added a new feature #feat-2341 to allow interviewers to leave notes on candidate performances. still need to work on #jent-15251 to improve the overall ui

next week - need to start working on Integration module, specifically #jent-16000 to integrate with new job boards. also want to tackle #jent-15566 on the Interview API. challenges - still having some issues with testing the Auto Job Apply Script, need to figure out a better way to mock out the job postings

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)

Key Updates

    Interview API
        - fixed #jent-15202 bug where interviews would sometimes not get recorded
        - did enhancements #enh-2345 to improve the overall response time, shaving off around 30ms

    Auto Job Apply Script
        - updated the script to handle new job posting formats #update-123
        - fixed a small issue with #bug-1098 where the script would crash if a job posting was missing certain fields
        - added a new feature #feat-3456 to allow the script to automatically follow up with employers after a certain amount of time

    Authentication
        - updated dependencies and fixed security vulnerabilities #chore-456
        - noticed a weird issue with #jent-15000 where auth tokens would sometimes expire too quickly

    React Interview
        - fixed bugs #bug-2342 #bug-2343 #bug-2344
        - added a new feature #feat-2341 to allow interviewers to leave notes on candidate performances

Key Achievements
    - Fixed the #jent-15202 bug in Interview API
    - Enhanced Auto Job Apply Script with new feature #feat-3456
    - Made progress on React Interview module with multiple bug fixes and a new feature

Challenges Encountered
    - Issues with testing the Auto Job Apply Script, need to figure out a better way to mock out job postings

Team Challenges
    - None

Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
    - Start working on Integration module, specifically #jent-16000 to integrate with new job boards
    - Tackle #jent-15566 on the Interview API

week 11 notes:
- search engine: 
  * fixed query parsing bug #jent-15202, was causing random errors
  * enhc: improved result ranking algo, still needs more testing
  * update: deps for search engine lib, no major issues found
- email service: 
  * feat: added support for custom email templates #feat-2345
  * chore: refactored email sender class for better readability
  * bug: #bug-1234 - email not sending to some users, still investigating
  * bug: fixed email content encoding issue #jent-17892
- notification service: 
  * chore: updated notification db schema to include priority field
  next week: 
  - finalize search engine ranking algo
  - test custom email templates
challenges: still having issues with email service performance, need to look into it ASAP 
also need to discuss with team about #jent-15202 fix, not sure if it's the best solution

MMU, Apr 13, 2026 (Apr 06 – Apr 10)

Key Updates

    Search Engine
        - fixed query parsing bug #jent-15202, was causing random errors
        - improved result ranking algo, still needs more testing
        - update: deps for search engine lib, no major issues found

    Email Service
        - added support for custom email templates #feat-2345
        - refactored email sender class for better readability
        - email not sending to some users #bug-1234, still investigating
        - fixed email content encoding issue #jent-17892

    Notification Service
        - updated notification db schema to include priority field

Key Achievements
    - Fixed query parsing bug in search engine
    - Added support for custom email templates
    - Improved search engine result ranking algorithm

Challenges Encountered
    - Email service performance issues
    - Uncertainty about the fix for #jent-15202

Team Challenges
    - Need to discuss #jent-15202 fix with the team

Key Tasks Scheduled for Next Week
    - Finalize search engine ranking algo
    - Test custom email templates

week 22 notes - 
admin dashboard: 
- fixed #jent-15202, was causing errors on IE11, had to override some css 
- enhc: added new filter options for user management, waiting for design team to give feedback on the layout
- chore: updated dependencies to latest versions, no issues found so far

search engine: 
- feat: implemented new algorithm for search results ranking, #search-421, needs more testing 
- bug: #bug-1987, sometimes search results are not displaying correctly on mobile devices, still investigating
- update: refactored some code to improve performance, reduced latency by 30%

payment gateway: 
- fixed #pay-1098, issue with payment processing for international transactions
- chore: removed some unused code, cleaned up the payment processing logic

next week: 
- finish testing the new search algorithm
- meet with design team to discuss admin dashboard layout

challenge: 
- still having some issues with the payment gateway and intl transactions, might need to reach out to the 3rd party provider for assistance 
- search engine performance on mobile devices is still a concern, need to optimize it further

Admin Dashboard:

- having some challenges with getting the new ui design to work, might need to bring in a designer to help out

next week: 
- finish implementing new job posting format for Jobma Bot
- start working on Auto Job Apply Script to integrate with Jobma Bot
- look into issues with Payment Gateway and saved payment methods 

still need to investigate crash issue with Jobma Bot, maybe its a memory leak or something
